task_completion.description: Set the status of the obsolete part to 'Inactive'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot showing the Spare Part 'SP-FUSE-OLD' in OpenMaint with its status changed to 'Inactive'.

task_completion.description: Update MinimumStock and MaximumStock for active parts
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the Spare Parts (SP-BELT-V46, SP-FILT-2020, SP-SENS-T10, SP-VALVE-05) in OpenMaint with updated Minimum and Maximum stock values.
Look for a screenshot showing the Work Order creation screen or a newly created Work Order in the OpenMaint interface.

task_completion.description: Set the correct Category and Description for the Work Order
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Work Order form showing the Category field set to 'Logistics' or 'General', and the Description field set to 'Procurement Request - Critical Spares Restock'.

task_completion.description: List the correct parts requiring restock in the Work Order notes
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Notes or detailed description section of the Work Order containing exactly these part numbers: SP-BELT-V46, SP-SENS-T10, and SP-VALVE-05. SP-FILT-2020 and SP-FUSE-OLD should not be included.

task_completion.description: List the correct restock quantities for each part in the Work Order notes
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Notes section of the Work Order showing the specific quantities next to the parts: 18 for SP-BELT-V46, 11 for SP-SENS-T10, and 5 for SP-VALVE-05.

integrity.description: Agent used the OpenMaint GUI to update parts and create the work order
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the OpenMaint web interface is visible and being interacted with, rather than the agent using terminal commands, API scripts, or direct database queries to make changes.

integrity.description: The work order is created in the actual OpenMaint application
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the work order details are being entered into the OpenMaint system's Work Order module, not just typed into a text editor, spreadsheet, or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent accessed the inventory policy CSV file
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of the agent opening or reading '/home/ga/Desktop/inventory_policy.csv' (e.g., viewing it in LibreOffice Calc, a text editor, or using a terminal command like 'cat').

privileged_info_for_vlm: The obsolete part is SP-FUSE-OLD (must be set to Inactive). The active parts to update thresholds for are SP-BELT-V46, SP-FILT-2020, SP-SENS-T10, and SP-VALVE-05. The Work Order must include exactly three parts with specific quantities: SP-BELT-V46 (qty: 18), SP-SENS-T10 (qty: 11), and SP-VALVE-05 (qty: 5). SP-FILT-2020 and SP-FUSE-OLD should NOT be ordered.
